backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that proxies HTTP GET requests and performs Google Custom Search API calls via HTTP outcalls, with a transform function that strips custom headers and adds a Content-Security-Policy header, and enforces HTTPS on all outgoing URLs.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping planned cloaking-mode selector features to their target source files, component dependencies, and test IDs, covering CloakButton.tsx and useCloaking.ts changes.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of components, hooks, styles, and configuration files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including background, foreground, border, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'Study Tools' with a neutral educational meta description and a noindex/nofollow robots tag to prevent search engine categorization.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders BrowserLayout alongside a dark-themed Sonner toaster with custom OKLCH color styles.
frontend/src/components/AddressBar.tsx: Address bar component that distinguishes URL input from search queries, handles keyboard navigation (Enter/Escape), and shows contextual icons and clear/submit buttons while focused.
frontend/src/components/BrowserLayout.ts: Main browser chrome layout component that orchestrates tab management, URL/search navigation via proxy and search mutations, and conditionally renders ProxyContent or SearchResults based on active tab state.
frontend/src/components/CloakButton.tsx: A toolbar button component that cloaks the current page by opening it in a new window disguised as a different URL (about:blank, https://error, or a numeric string), with a dropdown to select the cloaking mode.
frontend/src/components/ProxyContent.tsx: Renders proxied web content inside an iframe, injecting link and form interceptors to handle navigation, and displays loading/error states.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Displays a list of Google search results with title, snippet, and display URL, allowing navigation to a result via a callback.
frontend/src/components/TabBar.tsx: Renders a browser-style tab bar with support for switching, closing, and adding tabs, showing a loading indicator on active fetches.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCloaking.ts: A hook that provides a `cloak` function which opens the current page in a new popup window disguised under a chosen URL mode (about:blank, https://error, or a numeric string).
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exposes two React Query mutations—`useProxyRequest` for fetching proxied URLs and `useSearchRequest` for performing Google searches—both delegating to the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useTabManager.ts: Defines a `useTabManager` React hook that manages multiple browser-like tabs, each with URL, content, search results, and loading state. Provides add, close, switch, and update operations for tabs.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, imports Inter and JetBrains Mono fonts, and defines the Cheetah dark theme using OKLCH CSS custom properties along with custom utility classes for glows and scrollbars.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` context providers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with Cheetah brand colors (OKLCH), custom fonts, border radii, box shadows, and animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins enabled.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file describing Cheetah 1.0's architecture (Swift/SwiftNIO backend, React frontend), existing features (search engine, about:blank cloaking, tab system, dark theme), and known issues at schema version 11.
